Researcher in Computer Science

Cosimo Rulli

Working on efficient retrieval systems, vector search, and learned sparse retrieval at ISTI-CNR, Pisa.

I'm a computer science researcher at the Institute of Science and Information Technology "Alessandro Faedo" (ISTI-CNR), Pisa, Italy. My work focuses on making information retrieval fast and scalable — from approximate nearest neighbor search to learned sparse representations and neural network compression.

GitHub Google Scholar Contact
